name: expensify-pp-mcp
description: File expenses and submit reports to Expensify from the command line

expensify_auth_token.title: EXPENSIFY_AUTH_TOKEN
expensify_auth_token.description: Sets EXPENSIFY_AUTH_TOKEN for the Expensify MCP server. Get a credential from https://www.expensify.com/tools/integrations/.

expensify_partner_user_id.title: EXPENSIFY_PARTNER_USER_ID
expensify_partner_user_id.description: Sets EXPENSIFY_PARTNER_USER_ID for the Expensify MCP server. Get a credential from https://www.expensify.com/tools/integrations/.

expensify_partner_user_secret.title: EXPENSIFY_PARTNER_USER_SECRET
expensify_partner_user_secret.description: Sets EXPENSIFY_PARTNER_USER_SECRET for the Expensify MCP server. Get a credential from https://www.expensify.com/tools/integrations/.
